name: C2C Advanced Systems: Specialized Defence Play

posts.author: meekinvestor
posts.community: C2C Advanced Systems: Specialized Defence Play
posts.text: I got out of it fast. It is still rising, but no regrets. Allergic to people of doubtful integrity.

posts.author: Nair_Aravind_Babu
posts.community: C2C Advanced Systems: Specialized Defence Play
posts.text: “Market can stay irrational longer than you can stay solvent” - John Maynard Keynes. *Disclaimer - Invested

posts.author: meekinvestor
posts.community: C2C Advanced Systems: Specialized Defence Play
posts.text: This should once again be a lesson to me to not buy anything impetuously. It is always advisable to take a long breath and come to valuepickr thread on the company. I was swayed by the financials. Google Finance assured me that there was nothing to the fall in the price, and most importantly, names of Ashish Kacholia and Mukul Agrawal as share-holders (if they have invested in it, could I be wrong?). Now to get out of the chakravyuh. PS: What is not clear is as to how its shares have risen ₹326 on 23rd March this year, to ₹464 on 16th April!
